title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 387.402 - TNC drivers, what not considered — vehicle registration as for-hire vehicle
text:
387.402.  TNC drivers, what not considered — vehicle registration as for-hire vehicle. — Notwithstanding any other provision of law, TNCs and TNC drivers shall not be considered common carriers, contract carriers, or motor carriers, as defined in section 390.020, a taxicab, as defined in section 390.020, a taxicab service or association, or a for-hire vehicle service.  A TNC driver shall not be required to register the vehicle such driver uses to provide prearranged rides as a commercial or for-hire vehicle.
(L. 2017 H.B. 130)
